action_history.reason: K3o is weak but King-high has some value against a limping range. Calling to see a cheap flop with position. Can continue if we hit a King, otherwise easy fold.
Q3s is weak but suited, GTO indicates 70% raise frequency when opening from SB, raising to build pot and potentially win immediately
K3o is too weak to call a raise. Getting 1.67:1 odds but hand has poor equity against a raising range. Out of position with a dominated King and terrible kicker. Easy fold.
